repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Department of Consumer Economics and Housing records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Consumer Economics and Housing

did.physdesc: Reading lists, annual reports, list of theses, department meeting minutes, master plan, photographs, and Five Year Review and correspondence
did.abstract: Reading lists, annual reports, list of theses from 1926-1990, department meeting minutes, master plan, and Five Year Review and correspondence.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Reading lists, annual reports, list of theses from 1926-1990, department meeting minutes, master plan, and Five Year Review and correspondence.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Correspondence Box 2- Folder 55, Box 5- Folders 3-4, 6, 11-12
A. Course Outlines/ Reading ListsBox 1- Folders 18-45, Box 2- Folders 46-54
C. Faculty MeetingsBox 1- Folders 10-17, Box 5- Folders 13-16
Series V. Publications Box 5- Folder 18-19, Box7- Folders 1-5
A. AnnualBox 1- Folder 7-9, Box 3, Box 5- Folder 1-2
E. Chair's Reports to the DeanBox 1, Folder 46
Series VII. Subject Files Box 1- Folders 1, 4-6, 47, 50 Box 2- Folders 56-61

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Department of Consumer Economics and Housing records, #23-23-2864. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: From its founding to ca. 1969 in the College of Home Economics today's College of Human Ecology, the department was called Household Economics and Management. From 1969 to 1977 it was known as the Department of Consumer Economics and Public Policy. After 1977 it changed to the Department of Consumer Economics and Housing and in 1998 it merged with the Department of Human Service Studies to become the Department of Policy Analysis and Management.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: See also Cornell University Department of Human Service Studies records, #23-24-2894
See also Cornell University Department of Policy Analysis and Management records, #23-26-3006

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Gwen Bymers, Scott Maynes, Keith Bryant, Jean Robinson, Richard Burkhauser
